scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=@(3001,5173); foreach ($port in $ports) { $ids=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach ($id in $ids) { if ($id -and $id -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }"
scripts.predev:server: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$port=3001; $ids=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); foreach ($id in $ids) { if ($id -and $id -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
scripts.start:prod: turbo run build --filter=client --filter=server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter server start
